vision: Build the reference IDE extension for Documentation-Driven Development: a lightweight, agent-agnostic JetBrains plugin that scaffolds and manages the `.ai_context/` folder, turning project documentation into the primary interface between developers and AI agents.

steps.name: Phase 1 — Core structure
steps.description: Init action, tool window, basic templates, skills/, steps/

steps.name: Phase 2 — dev-context.json & context panel
steps.description: Migrate to dev-context.json, show vision+steps+todos in tool window panel

task.title: Migrate to dev-context.json & align with VSCode plugin
task.description: Apply same dev-context.json structure (vision + steps + task with todos) to TemplateProvider.kt, DddActions.kt and DddToolWindowFactory.kt

todos.text: Update DddActions.kt: NewTaskAction reads steps from dev-context.json
Build and test in IntelliJ sandbox

lastSession.done: Full UX polish pass: Quick init, spec auto-creation, steps retrospective, selective spec deletion, CONTRACT session protocol, plugin.xml marketplace, tests and CHANGELOG — v1.0.1 ready to publish
